name: HELLDIVERS™ 2
short_description: The Galaxy’s Last Line of Offence. Enlist in the Helldivers and join the fight for freedom across a hostile galaxy in a fast, frantic, and ferocious third-person shooter.
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil*, Spanish - Latin America*, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
